text: Here, I find myself immersed in an atmosphere of inquiry and innovation. The first space, with its glass walls and bright lights, evokes anticipation—a sense of potential ideas ready to be explored around a table. The second space, filled with the bold symbols of "R+D" and walls preaching the virtues of human-technology symbiosis, stirs within me a reflective excitement. I feel the presence of purpose, of the human spirit striving to connect knowledge with creativity. My mind is invigorated, curious about the unfolding narrative of progress and collaboration.
